title: 熊猫布布便携恒温杯 tips for parents on the road
subtitle: Warm milk in the cup holder, in minutes
voiceover_20s: No easy way to warm a bottle in the car? A bulky warmer does not fit your cup holder routine. Designed for your cup holder — warm milk on the drive. Compact in the cup holder, easy to grab on every drive. Save this before your next car ride with baby.

storyboard.visual: 车内杯架加热：近景口播/问题特写
storyboard.voiceover_en: No easy way to warm a bottle in the car?
storyboard.subtitle_en: No easy way to warm a bottle in the car?
storyboard.visual_prompt: 车内杯架加热：近景口播/问题特写；产品：熊猫布布便携恒温杯；人群：0-12月新手爸妈；场景：车内杯架加热（全片统一，禁止混入其他场景）；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶的圆柱暖奶容器，非奶瓶暖奶器）；用法：从储奶袋或家用奶瓶经翻开顶盖倒入杯内加热保温，再倾斜杯身经盖面圆孔出液嘴倒出到干净奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、从宽口直倒（必须经过圆孔出液嘴）、奶瓶浸在杯中加热；进液来源仅限：储奶袋（母乳储存袋）或家里日常使用的婴儿奶瓶倒奶；禁止出现：市售牛奶塑料瓶、鲜奶纸盒/利乐包、酸奶杯、任意商超乳制品包装；结构严格对照产品参考图：顶部为翻盖式铰链盖（侧面浅紫矩形按键弹开），非螺旋旋盖；倒出口为盖面碗形凹槽内的小圆孔出液嘴，倾斜杯身时暖奶从此圆孔流出；进液经翻开顶盖倒入杯内腔体；盖下深紫装饰环 nurture wise 标识；下段竖向数显屏（°F 温度）及图标；数显旁椭圆形 recessed 电源键；底部 recessed 充电口（硅胶盖内，非杯身侧面 USB 口）；禁止画成：圆顶旋盖、宽口直倒、杯身侧面充电口、奶瓶放入杯内；竖屏9:16
storyboard.seedance_prompt: Hook opening, in-car cup holder warming, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, medium shot holding portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital °F display, pour-spout reference photo beside separate baby bottle on bedside table, warm soft light, subtle push-in, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, match approved person reference. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; never put bottle inside cup. Mood: No easy way to warm a bottle in the car?

Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; never put bottle inside cup. A bulky warmer does not fit your cup holder routine.

Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; never put bottle inside cup. Designed for your cup holder — warm milk on the drive.
